programme.title: Duck Camp Dinners
programme.desc: After a late night of good times, venison chili, and some old school roux the crew heads out for another day of hunting ducks. Adaptability is critical, and after a couple of quick adjustments the team finds themselves back in the ducks.

programme.title: Hard Truths of Conservation EP-9
programme.desc: When Dick Cabela founded “Cabela's” in 1961, he was unaware it would become the foremost outfitting store in the world. So it's only fitting that his son is on a quest to explore the Hard Truths of conservation. Join Dan Cabela, on this high-impact journey of discovery, as he uncovers some lesser-known facts about conservation. In particular, the role which hunting and the utilization of wildlife

programme.title: The Whale Whisperer
programme.desc: This film follows the inspiring relationship between whale whisperer Vicki Neville and thehumpback whales of Australia. Never-before-seen behaviours have been documented by a team of five cinematographers over the three-month whale season in Hervey Bay, all captured in glorious 4K. These stunning close encounters capture whales like you have never seen them before!

programme.title: Strangers in Danger
programme.desc: In this food-filled episode, Catfish throws up all over the world. The biking duo try various forms of genitalia including bull testicle, tiger and sea penis, virgin eggs, otherwise known as pee billed eggs, and more. They try duck head in China and worm tequila and mosquito eggs in Mexico. The question becomes, can you keep it down while watching this special episode?

programme.desc: Seorang selebriti, menghasilkan resepi baharu untuk kek, pastri, dan hidangan savouri dengan menggunakan bahan-bahan tempatan dan teknik membakar dan mengukus untuk mencipta hidangan yang lazat and inovatif

programme.title: Startup Sarawak Ep03
programme.desc: Startup Sarawak' brings digital entrepreneurs and other stakeholders in promoting development of digital startup companies and initiatives in positioning Sarawak as the preferred startup hub for technology

programme.title: Borneo Tech Heroes Ep02
programme.desc: Borneo's digital revolution in this documentary,showcasing innovative tech,thriving startups,and how they're transforming communities and reshaping the island's socio-economic landscape in the 4.0 era.

programme.title: The Last Highlanders of Borneo Ep04
programme.desc: Travel series presented by Hiker and Explorer, Ian Vong across two remote regions of northeast of Sarawak, namely Bario and Ba'kelalan. and closely following the indigenous tribes of the Orang-Ulu.

programme.title: Caves & Caverns Ep11
programme.desc: Our hostess explores Borneo's hidden gems, documenting her experiences, flora, fauna, paragliding, bird watching, and stunning sunsets, ensuring a captivating and exciting adventure.

programme.title: 3D Jobs Ep05
programme.desc: Aims to highlight and honor the unsung heroes of our communities who bravely perform challenging, hazardous, and dangerous jobs, showcasing their daily lives and their life stories beyond their work.

programme.title: My Journey With Nature Ep10
programme.desc: Pengembaraan seorang wanita ke kawasan pendalaman yang belum diterokai diceritakan dalam 'My Journey with Nature', yang menampilkan tarikan pelancongan alam semula jadi.

programme.title: Borneo Dive Ep08
programme.desc: Explore the unique dive sites of Sabah and Sarawak, which attract both local and international divers. The region offers a rich variety of marine life for recreational and avid divers to observe.

programme.title: Beautiful Mind Ep02
programme.desc: A series on the current state of our national mental health and center on stigmas around mental health conditions. Highlights the different types of mental health issue and stories happening in Malaysia.

programme.title: 3 Mak Dara S2 Ep12
programme.desc: 3 Mak Dara kembali untuk Musim Kedua dengan nafas baharu yang lebih bersahaja dan santai. Dihoskan oleh tiga orang selebriti tanah air iaitu Raja Azura, Sharifah Shahora dan Rita Rudaini.

programme.title: Rihlah - Islam Di Borneo Ep06
programme.desc: Rihlah - Islam Di Borneo menjejaki sejarah dan perkembangan Islam di Sarawak serta hubungannya dengan Sabah, Kalimantan dan Brunei melalui budaya, migrasi dan komuniti tempatan.

programme.title: Homegrown Ep04
programme.desc: Local native chef explore these home-grown ingredients from farm to table; sharing its goodness through the traditional ways of using the ingredients and plans to elevate the flavors in modern cooking.

programme.title: (L) TVS Pagi
programme.desc: TVS Pagi membawakan perkembangan menyeluruh dari dalam dan luar negara.

programme.title: Joran Borneo Ep02
programme.desc: JORAN BORNEO,'Majalah' travelog dalam Bahasa Melayu/dialek tempatan ini bakal menjejaki lokasi-lokasi 'lubuk' ikan di sekitar BORNEO. Siri ini akan dibawa oleh 2 pengacara tempatan dari Sarawak dan Sabah.

programme.title: U.S. Open Golf Official Film 2005
programme.desc: The official film of the 2005 US Open, chronicling Michael Campbell's triumph at Pinehurst after fending off Retief Goosen and Tiger Woods.

programme.title: U.S. Open Golf Official Film 2006
programme.desc: Revisit the 2006 US Open, a tournament remembered for Geoff Ogilvy's late surge to the crown, outlasting home favourite Phil Mickelson.

programme.title: U.S. Open Golf Official Film 2007
programme.desc: The story of the 2007 US Open Championship at Oakmont Country Club in Pennsylvania. Geoff Ogilvy was aiming to become the first player to retain his title since Curtis Strange in 1989.

programme.title: U.S. Open Golf Official Film 2008
programme.desc: Ahead of the US Open, the year's second golf major, take a look back to 2008 with the official film of the tournament. Argentina's Angel Cabrera was the defending champion from 2007.

programme.title: U.S. Open Golf Official Film 2009
programme.desc: A review of the 2009 US Open which was held at Bethpage State Park, New York. It was the second Major of the year and another memorable event, with American Lucas Glover the victor.

programme.title: U.S. Open Golf Official Film 2010
programme.desc: A look back at the 2010 US Open at Pebble Beach Golf Links. It was a tournament that saw Ryder Cup star Graeme McDowell take his game to a whole new level.

programme.title: U.S. Open Golf Official Film 2011
programme.desc: A chance to relive the 2011 US Open which was held at Congressional Country Club in Maryland. Northern Ireland's Rory McIlroy stormed to the first Major title of his career.

programme.title: U.S. Open Golf Official Film 2012
programme.desc: The story of the 2012 US Open Championship from the Olympic Club in San Francisco. Northern Irishman Rory McIlroy won this tournament by an incredible eight strokes in 2011.

programme.title: PGA Tour Champions Highlights
programme.desc: Tournament highlights from the American Family Insurance Championship - a PGA Tour Champions team event held at TPC Wisconsin.

programme.title: McGinley & Chamblee At The US Open
programme.desc: Join Paul McGinley and Brandel Chamblee as they preview the action ahead of the 126th edition of the US Open Championship at Shinnecock Hills.

programme.title: U.S. Open Golf Official Film 2001
programme.desc: Producing one of the wildest endings in championship history, the 2001 US Open at Southern Hills Country Club in Tulsa, Oklahoma, was one to remember.

programme.title: McGinley & Chamblee At The US Open
programme.desc: Join Paul McGinley and Brandel Chamblee as they preview the action ahead of the 126th edition of the US Open Championship at Shinnecock Hills.

programme.title: Live From The US Open
programme.desc: The 126th US Open Championship is almost here - join the game's leading stars and pundits for all the build-up ahead of the third men's Major of 2026.

programme.title: Rose Ladies Series Golf
programme.desc: Comprising five one-day warm-up tournaments across England for stars of the LET, the 2026 edition of the Rose Ladies Series concluded at North Hants Golf Club.

programme.title: PGA Tour Champions Highlights
programme.desc: Tournament highlights from the Principal Charity Classic - a PGA Tour Champions event held at the Wakonda Club. Spain's Miguel Angel Jiménez conquered the rest a year ago.

programme.title: HotelPlanner Tour Golf Highlights
programme.desc: Highlights from the Interwetten Open during the 2026 season of the HotelPlanner Tour, the second tier of men's professional golf in Europe.

programme.title: Legends Tour Golf Highlights
programme.desc: Highlights from the 2026 Legends Tour, as the Costa Navarino Legends came next on the calendar - taking place in Greece.

programme.title: U.S. Open Golf Official Film 2013
programme.desc: A chance to relive the 2013 US Open at Merion Golf Club in Ardmore, Pennsylvania. America's Webb Simpson claimed a narrow one-stroke victory the previous year.

programme.title: U.S. Open Golf Official Film 2014
programme.desc: The story of the 2014 US Open Championship at the No. 2 Course of the Pinehurst Resort in North Carolina. England's Justin Rose came into this event as the defending champion.

programme.title: U.S. Open Golf Official Film 2015
programme.desc: The official film of the 2015 US Open, one of golf's four majors. Martin Kaymer went in as the defending champion from 2014.

programme.title: U.S. Open Golf Official Film 2016
programme.desc: The official film of the 2016 US Open. Hosted at Oakmont Country Club in Pennsylvania, one of the world's most difficult courses, Jordan Spieth came in as the defending champion.

programme.title: U.S. Open Golf Official Film 2017
programme.desc: The official film of the 2017 US Open. Hosted at Erin Hills in Wisconsin, Dustin Johnson came into the tournament as the defending champion from the previous year.

The downside to it is that it will result in its user's death after twenty-four hours.

Many years later, his parents die from disease. Aod continues to live alone at home and does not associate with anyone.

programme.desc: Transform the way you clean with the Acerpure Clean V2 cordless vacuum, designed for modern living. Its ultra-strong suction power and multi-stage filtration system capture even the finest dust in your homes. Lightweight yet powerful, it makes cleaning quick and comfortable with its ergonomic design and long-lasting battery.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 241
programme.desc: HQ Lingzhi Cracked Spores Powder is formulated and manufactured in Singapore. It enhances the body's immune system, reduces fatigue, promotes blood circulation, protects the liver, and improves metabolism.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 296
programme.desc: A daily wellness duo that strengthens bones, supports joints, and protects eyesight. Bone Health Formula combines Japanese shell-derived calcium, fish collagen, and chondroitin to reinforce bones and joints, while Eyes Nourisher adds Japanese blueberries, carrots, and lutein to reduce eye fatigue, filter blue light, and maintain clear vision.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 309
programme.desc: The Tupperware Freezable 5-Container Set makes meal prep and long-term storage easy, locking in freshness and flavour. Tupperware’s No. 1 freezing containers feature a speedy-freeze design and flexible material for easy unmolding. Available in multiple sizes, there’s a perfect container for every freezer storage need.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 244
programme.desc: A plant-based protein nutritional drink that ensures a balanced intake of nutrients, promoting visible improvements in muscle health, immune resilience, eye health, and digestion.

programme.title: Taiwan's 1001 Stories S9 - EP 9 / 台湾1001个故事 S9
programme.desc: This programme introduces to viewers Taiwan's popular eateries, restaurants and its moving stories.

programme.title: National Flavours - EP 9 / 民族味
programme.desc: In this brand new series, savour iconic cuisine from over the world! Hosted by Belinda Lee, Joanna Dong and Darren Lim, discover the national flavours of Brazil's Feijoada, the dedication and pride Spanish have for their prized ham, the rich cultural legacies behind Hong Kong's wonton noodles and more!

programme.title: Bravo, My Life - EP 42 / 加油我的人生
programme.desc: This series follows Xu Dongxi as she decides to raise her nephew as a single mother while struggling to establish herself as a designer.

programme.desc: Bi An's sincerity towards the Chinese paid off, and they came in doves to the Savings Bank to open a savings account. Marquis Guo is impressed with Bi An. Wan Er is able to tell Bi De and Bi An apart.

programme.desc: Taizhu's uncle, Jin Mingzai, whom she has missed for a long time, suddenly comes to the shop looking for her. When he finds that she is not there, he leaves his business card with Sulin.

Despite her efforts, she faces one challenge after another, forcing her to become even stronger in order to endure. Surrounded by people who are cruel and hostile towards her, Mutiara’s journey seems relentless. Fortunately, she has a loyal friend in Dianda, who continuously supports and encourages her to persevere.

programme.title: Juara Memasak Senior Vs Junior - EP 4
programme.desc: Juara Memasak returns with a new spin, pitting youths against their senior counterparts. Can the seniors defeat the youths with their vast experience and knowledge, or will the youths edge the seniors out with their creativity and new innovations? The kitchen is set for the most exciting cook-off battle yet. Watch as they fight to win 25,000 and be crowned as the champion.

programme.title: Behen Hogi Teri
programme.desc: Neighbours Gattu and Binniy are in love. But according to their localty, girls from the neighbourhood are to be considered sisters. How will their love story hold up?

programme.title: Commando 2: the Black Money Trail
programme.desc: Commando Karan uses his combat skills to eradicate black money, which has been siphoned to banks abroad.

programme.title: Army
programme.desc: Newly-wed Arjun, an army man, is brutally killed by Naagraj, a gangster. His wife, Geeta, determined to avenge her husband, raises an army of dedicated young men to kill Naagraj.

programme.title: Laadla
programme.desc: The headstrong owner of a factory, Sheetal, marries Raju, the union leader of the factory, to quell his spirit and teach him a lesson. In the process, she ends up learning a few lessons herself.

programme.title: Mard
programme.desc: Azad, a wealthy prosperous king, is locked in a dungeon by General Dyer who wants to take over his kingdom. Years later, Azad's son comes to his father's rescue and puts an end to Dyer's tyranny.

programme.title: Paltan
programme.desc: Based on the 1967 Nathu La and Cho La clashes, the film shows the heroics of the Indian army against the Chinese military along the Sikkim border.

programme.title: Hero No.1
programme.desc: A wealthy heir goes undercover as Raju, a multi-talented man, taking on household chores cooking, cleaning, and entertaining to win over his girlfriend's family.

programme.title: Pal Pal Dil Ke Paas
programme.desc: When video blogger Saher Sethi embarks on a tedious trek with mountaineer Karan Sehgal, sparks are bound to fly. But will their love story blossom despite the odds?

programme.desc: After abortion, a woman's life takes an unexpected turn when she is visited by the foetus, who is now grown up and is visible to her.

programme.title: FOOD ADVENTURE
programme.desc: Discover the rich and diverse flavors of Indonesian cuisine — from traditional dishes and street food to heartwarming homemade meals.

programme.title: THE SULTAN ENTERTAINMENT
programme.desc: The Sultan is a talk show featuring two sultan-like hosts: Sultan Andara and Raffi Ahmad and Sultan Bintaro and Andre Taulany, accompanied by a cast of beautiful and handsome employees. It features spectacular guest stars and is definitely not to be missed. Find out more at The Sultan Entertainment.

programme.title: HIKMAH
programme.desc: A reality show that encapsulates everyday life stories, personal trials, and spiritual journeys. The program is rich in moral values, showcasing individuals as they navigate complex life dilemmas until they ultimately uncover the silver lining and wisdom behind every trial they endure

programme.title: Aku Senang Kalo Kamu Bek Bek Aja?
programme.desc: Mela's marriage to Jordy failed due to her father's disapproval. Dion, a wealthy mama's boy, came to the village and met Mela herding ducks. It turned out that Dion and Mela's mother were friends from college and intended to arrange a marriage for their children.

programme.title: Kejar Hatimu Sampai Ke Korea
programme.desc: Bryan (Kiki Farrel) refuses to accept being accused of fraud by Dhea (Ina Marika) because Dhea told him that Bryan's travel business was a scam. Because of Dhea, Bryan suffered losses and many clients canceled their trips. As compensation, Dhea had to work at Bryan's travel business for two weeks.

programme.title: FOOD ADVENTURE
programme.desc: Discover the rich and diverse flavors of Indonesian cuisine — from traditional dishes and street food to heartwarming homemade meals.

programme.title: BINTANG PANTURA 6
programme.desc: Bintang Pantura 6 is back! The legendary 'Juragan' Soimah, joined by her trusty assistant Nunung and business partner Inul Daratista, is on a mission to find 40 talented contestants. Who will make the cut and finally perform on the stage of their dreams?

programme.title: SANG MUBALIGH
programme.desc: A profound moral journey rich in Islamic teachings and spiritual outreach (dakwah). This special religious drama is carefully crafted as a thematic program to commemorate major Islamic holy days, such as the sacred night of Isra' Mi'raj, reflecting on faith, redemption, and divine guidance

programme.title: Susah Banget Dah Memadamkan Api Cinta
programme.desc: Bimo (Ridho Ilahi) is a chef and restaurant owner who was saved by Luna (Shanice Margaretha) from a fire. Bimo recently broke up with Indah because she was too focused on her restaurant. Bimo tries to get close to Luna, the firefighter who saved his life.

programme.desc: This program, which focuses on Islamic jurisprudence and Sufism, draws from everyday life stories and is delivered by highly knowledgeable Ustaz. Its aim is to enlighten us Muslims and guide us toward the ultimate goal of life: Jannah, or God's paradise.

programme.title: FOOD ADVENTURE
programme.desc: Discover the rich and diverse flavors of Indonesian cuisine — from traditional dishes and street food to heartwarming homemade meals.

programme.title: SANG MUBALIGH
programme.desc: A profound moral journey rich in Islamic teachings and spiritual outreach (dakwah). This special religious drama is carefully crafted as a thematic program to commemorate major Islamic holy days, such as the sacred night of Isra' Mi'raj, reflecting on faith, redemption, and divine guidance

programme.title: LIGA DANGDUT 2021

programme.title: Kejar Hatimu Sampai Ke Korea
programme.desc: Bryan (Kiki Farrel) refuses to accept being accused of fraud by Dhea (Ina Marika) because Dhea told him that Bryan's travel business was a scam. Because of Dhea, Bryan suffered losses and many clients canceled their trips. As compensation, Dhea had to work at Bryan's travel business for two weeks.

programme.title: NAWAITU SURGA

programme.title: Aku Senang Kalo Kamu Bek Bek Aja?
programme.desc: Mela's marriage to Jordy failed due to her father's disapproval. Dion, a wealthy mama's boy, came to the village and met Mela herding ducks. It turned out that Dion and Mela's mother were friends from college and intended to arrange a marriage for their children.
